# Mesmer Prism

> Public website for Mesmer Prism: research notes, writing projects, XR and perception tools, source maps, and portfolio context.

Use the Markdown alternates for compact reading. Use the BibTeX or CSL JSON alternates when importing references into tools such as Zotero. The canonical human pages remain the HTML URLs.

## Machine-readable indexes
- [Agent index](https://mesmerprism.com/agent-index.json): JSON list of public pages, summaries, machine-readable alternates, and reference-export paths.
- [All references BibTeX](https://mesmerprism.com/references/all.bib): Combined references detected from public pages.
- [All references CSL JSON](https://mesmerprism.com/references/all.csl.json): Combined references in CSL JSON.
- [Sitemap](https://mesmerprism.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for canonical HTML pages.

## Site pages
- [Shared Bodies for Mixed-Ability Collaboration](https://mesmerprism.com/duisburg/index.md): A Duisburg-facing research pitch for Mixed-Ability Human-Swarm Interaction: shared swarm bodies, inspectable input mappings, and a route from connectedness to robotics translation.
- [Video carousel demo](https://mesmerprism.com/tmp/video-carousel-demo.md)

## Core
- [Mesmer Prism | Till Holzapfel](https://mesmerprism.com/index.md): XR systems, citizen-science tools, visual instruments, and essays for altered-perception design. Mesmer Prism makes strange experience vivid, inspectable, and evidence-bounded.

## Optional
- [Calligraphy Reference Pack](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/assets/calligraphy-reference-pack/board.md)
- [Hollow Face Lab Browser App](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/hollow-face-lab/app/index.md): Browser-hosted Hollow Face Lab renderer with concavity, lighting, mesh, probe, texture, and response controls.

## Plasmatic Multitudes
- [Somaesthetics Appendix | Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/background/somaesthetics.md): A short public note on somaesthetics as the method anchor for Plasmatic Multitudes.
- [Long Essay: Semi-Corporeal Avatar Aesthetics | Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/essay.md): A long-form essay on weakly bounded bodies, XR embodiment, media genealogy, computational morphogenesis, and cautious pain translation.
- [Plasmatic Multitudes Field Guide](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/index.md): Long essay, method notes, vocabulary, pain-translation hypotheses, mixed-ability human-swarm interaction, and annotated references for weakly bounded bodies and semi-corporeal avatar aesthetics.
- [Mixed-Ability Human-Swarm Interaction | Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/mixed-ability-hsi.md): A Plasmatic Multitudes research track on shared visual swarm bodies, mixed-ability collaboration, access-practice mapping, connectedness-first exploration, encounter, cooperative play, and later physical translation.
- [Plasmatic Avatars and Chronic Pain VR | Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/pain.md): A cautious research note on boundary precision, avatar materiality, protective fields, ownership, agency, and pain-related body-representation hypotheses. Not a treatment claim.
- [Method: Boundary Precision | Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/project.md): A compact method note on boundary precision, somaesthetics, coherence, morphogenesis, and weakly bounded body design.
- [Annotated Sources for Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/references.md): Annotated references across somaesthetics, perception, pseudo-haptics, morphogenesis, XR embodiment, media genealogy, and pain/body-representation research.
- [Vocabulary for Weakly Bounded Bodies | Plasmatic Multitudes](https://mesmerprism.com/plasmatic-multitudes/terminology.md): Terms for semi-corporeal avatars, plasmatic bodies, particle bodies, swarm bodies, aura avatars, boundary precision, pseudo-haptics, and related design concepts.

## Project pages
- [Altered Xperience Project](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/altered-xperience-project.md): The Altered Xperience Project is a CIRCE-led citizen-science survey for anonymous altered-state reports, with multilingual questionnaires, feedback, scoring, exports, and collaborator workflow.
- [Bioelectricity and Morphogenesis](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/bioelectricity.md): Bioelectricity and morphogenesis in Rusty Morphospace: a source-linked educational planarian surface-field model built with Rusty Matter and visualized through Rusty Optics.
- [Brain Candy](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/brain-candy.md): Brain Candy studies rhythmic light, recursive visual structure, sound, breath, expectation, and interaction as tunable non-drug state-shift design.
- [Bressloff and Rule Modeling Deep Dive](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/bressloff-v1-form-constants-deep-dive.md): A notebook-style deep dive into Bressloff form constants, Rule flicker modeling, and generated driven neural-field diagnostics after Rule.
- [Bressloff V1 Form Constants](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/bressloff-v1-form-constants.md): Animated notes on Bressloff visual-cortex form constants, Rule flicker modeling, and generated MacKay, Bolelli, and Nicks driven-field diagnostics.
- [Deep Dream](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/deep-dream.md): Deep Dream explains how machine-vision hallucination, community visual taxonomies, VR research, and cyberdelic systems shaped simulated psychedelic vision.
- [Fractal Optics](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/fractal-optics.md): Fractal Optics maps fractal phototherapy, retinal and ophthalmic stimulation, VR delivery, and patterned-light comparator literatures.
- [Hollow Face Lab](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/hollow-face-lab.md): Hollow Face Lab maps WebGL, WebXR, texture controls, and Rusty XR implementation choices against hollow-face and depth-inversion research.
- [Optical Movement Illusions](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/optical-movement-illusions.md): Optical Movement Illusions maps peripheral drift, Rotating Snakes, static motion illusions, color and luminance parameters, and the mechanism-design bridge into perceptual tooling.
- [Phenomenological Control](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/phenomenological-control.md): A public guide to phenomenological control, imagery variation, expectation-shaped experience, source monitoring, absorption, porosity, hypnosis, induced vision, and meaning-making.
- [Plasmatic Multitudes - Weakly Bounded Embodiment and Semi-Corporeal Avatar Design](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/plasmatic-multitudes.md): A public overview of weakly bounded bodies: avatars, swarms, auras, particle forms, and luminous bodies that soften while remaining coherent enough for embodiment, relation, and cautious research translation.
- [Polar H10 Work](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/polar-h10.md): Public overview of Mesmer Prism's Polar H10 work across minimal signal packages, Rusty XR, Quest broker streams, Windows capture, Android diagnostics, Unity Quest integration, and Viscereality research tooling.
- [Prophantasia](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/prophantasia.md): Prophantasia covers projected imagery, aphantasia, source judgment, practice ecology, and neighboring phenomena such as imposition, flicker, DeepDream, visual snow, and HPPD.
- [Rusty Morphospace](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/rusty-morphospace.md): Rusty Morphospace is a modular Rust platform for computational matter, situated relations, runtime authority, renderer-neutral inspection, and Quest validation.
- [Rusty XR Legacy Reference | Rusty Morphospace](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/rusty-morphospace/rusty-xr.md): Rusty XR is the legacy/reference Quest and XR compatibility surface under Rusty Morphospace, preserving public examples, passthrough notes, diagnostics, and companion-tool history.
- [SANE](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/sane.md): SANE is a proposed framework for reading coupled changes across somaesthetic practice, anthropotechnical mediation, noetic meaning, and emergent systems.
- [Scientific Surrealism](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/scientific-surrealism.md): Scientific surrealism studies dream bureaus, scientific-looking journals, diagrams, and experimental machines that change what counts as an observation.
- [Tulpas](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/tulpas.md): Tulpas covers modern online tulpamancy, thoughtforms, headmates, servitors, egregores, imposition, voice-like experience, and adjacent AI companion analogies.
- [Quest Companion Tools](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/viscereality-companion.md): Quest Companion Tools provides Windows and Android utilities for Meta Quest install, launch, casting, diagnostics, and evidence capture.
- [Viscereality](https://mesmerprism.com/projects/viscereality.md): Viscereality is a Quest-based bioresponsive VR research system for breath interaction, cardiac coherence training, oscillator-driven visuals, and repeatable study sessions.

## Strobotorch
- [Flashing Light Safety | Strobotorch](https://mesmerprism.com/Strobotorch/flashing-light-safety/index.md): Safety warnings, frequency background, and source references for Strobotorch flashlight signaling.
- [Strobotorch Android Signal Tooling](https://mesmerprism.com/Strobotorch/index.md): Strobotorch is an Android flashlight-signaling and diagnostics tool for torch and camera APIs, visible-light signal tests, device logging, and flashing-light safety.
- [Project Scope | Strobotorch](https://mesmerprism.com/Strobotorch/project-boundary/index.md): The scope of Strobotorch Android flashlight signaling and diagnostics tooling.
- [Sources | Strobotorch](https://mesmerprism.com/Strobotorch/sources/index.md): Academic and public sources for Strobotorch flashing-light safety, frequency context, torch/camera diagnostics, and visible-light signal tooling.
